examples: Sixteen harrowing hours passed before an HH-60 Jayhawk helicopter spotted the life raft with Guy Schroder and just three other fishermen remaining inside.
Jayhawk earned the business of seven of the 12 firms involved in the settlement.
Kansas fans are already petitioning the White House to stop the new Jayhawk uniforms.
Indeed, a Jayhawk fan in Cowboy Stadium on Sunday bore a sign saying Kansas should have been playing.
